meta-description: Learn about self-employment income by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Self-employment income
excerpt: The net income you earn from your own trade or business. For example, any net income (profit) you earn from goods you sell or services you provide to others counts as self-employment income.
content:
The net income you earn from your own trade or business. For example, any net income (profit) you earn from goods you sell or services you provide to others counts as self-employment income.

Self-employment income could also come from a distributive share from a partnership.
